## Entities.isMoldedBonBonYield() function

Type guard to check if a yield is frame-based (for molded bonbons).

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function isMoldedBonBonYield(yieldSpec: AnyConfectionYield): yieldSpec is IMoldedBonBonYield;
```
